ZombieINC_challenge_AR_description,Quests,Quest Info,,x,"[Unique Weapon Mission] Allow me to share a brief story. During the outbreak in this city, cops and military forces were dispatched on an operation in this location to secure the area and establish a refuge. cntRoboticInboxGroupDesc,blocks,Container,,,"This container will automatically distribute resources placed within it if they are present in other nearby containers.\n\nResources can be distributed to any container [00ff80]{cvar(roboticInboxRangeH:within # horizontal meters;at any horizontal distance;directly above or below)}[-] and [00ff80]{cvar(roboticInboxRangeV:within # vertical meters;at any vertical distance;at equal vertical height)}[-], so long as the following conditions are met:\n1. If inbox is locked, target must be locked, and share same password.\n2. If inbox is unlocked, target must also be unlocked.\n3. If inbox is within an LCB, target must also be within same LCB.\n4. Backpack, vehicle, and non-player-placed storage are ignored.\n\nPress & hold [FF8000][action:local:Activate][action:permanent:Activate][-] to lock it or set a combination.",,,,,,,,,,,,,此容器會自動分配放入的資源，前提是附近其他容器中存在相同資源。\n\n資源可分發到任何[00ff80]{cvar(roboticInboxRangeH:within # horizontal meters;at any horizontal distance;directly above or below)}[-]且[00ff80]{cvar(roboticInboxRangeV:within # vertical meters;at any vertical distance;at equal vertical height)}[-]的容器，只要滿足以下條件：\n1. 若收件匣已上鎖，目標也必須上鎖且密碼相同。\n2. 若收件匣未上鎖，目標也必須未上鎖。\n3. 若收件匣位於某個 LCB 內，目標也必須位於同一個 LCB 內。\n4. 背包、載具與非玩家放置的儲物容器將被忽略。\n\n按住 [FF8000][action:local:Activate][action:permanent:Activate][-] 以將其上鎖或設定密碼。

ZombieINC_Introduction1Part2,Quest,Quest Info,,,"Continuing to part 2...\n\nJust To recap the previous information. To keep track of the bosses that have killed, a [DECEA3]New Progression Quest[-] was add. A New Boss is unlocked when this quest is finished.\n\n[DECEA3]New Perks:[-] Different perks were added distributed within the attributes with a new progression requirement. Boss Score is a new requirement for the apocalyptic perks. Obtain boss score by delivering the death blow to the bosses. Tier 1 bosses grant 1 Boss Score, Tier 2 grants 2, and so on...\nAlso Bosses are splited in normal ones and Infested Versions. Normal bosses are distributed between Tier 1 and 5 Quests. Infested Versions are only Tier 6 and grants 1 boss infested score. They are way more powerful, with diferent visuals and new attacks compared with it's normal version.\n\n[DECEA3]New Magazine:[-] You can Obtain this new magazine as a reward from hunt missions.\n\nThe diferent types of mission will be presented on part 3...",,,,,,,,,,,,,繼續第 2 部分... \n \n 只是回顧一下前面的信息。為了追蹤已殺死的 Boss，新增了[DECEA3]新進度任務[-]。當這個任務完成後，一個新的首領就會被解鎖。 \n \n [DECEA3] 新福利： [-] 新增了不同的福利，分佈在具有新進度要求的屬性中。 Boss 分數是世界末日福利的新要求。透過給老闆致命一擊來獲得老闆分數。第 1 層 Boss 授予 1 個 Boss 分數，第 2 層授予 2 個 Boss 分數，依此類推... \n 此外，Boss 分為普通版本和 Infested 版本。普通 Boss 分佈在 1 級和 5 級任務之間。 Infested 版本僅為 6 級，並授予 1 個 Boss Infested 分數。與普通版本相比，它們更加強大，具有不同的視覺效果和新的攻擊方式。 \n \n [DECEA3]新雜誌：[-]您可以透過狩獵任務獲得這本新雜誌作為獎勵。 \n \n 不同類型的任務將在第 3 部分介紹...

ZombieINC_Introduction1Part3,Quest,Quest Info,,,Continuing to part 3...\n\n[DECEA3]Hunt Missions:[-] The core of the entire mod. Hunt down all the beasts created by radiation and human manipulation that stand in the way of the trader's business. You can receive very unique rewards from the trader for some bosses. Also search the bosses dead body for some unique loot.\n\n[DECEA3]Weapon Contracts:[-] The trader can offer you some great opportunities to obtain unique weapons. Search the weapons tab for the contracts to buy. Keep in mind that more weapons are offered as your game stage increases.\n\nContinuation in Part 4.,,,,,,,,,,,,,繼續第 3 部分... \n \n [DECEA3] 狩獵任務： [-] 整個模組的核心。追捕所有由輻射和人類操縱產生的阻礙商人生意的野獸。對於某些老闆，您可以從商人那裡獲得非常獨特的獎勵。也要搜索老闆的屍體，尋找一些獨特的戰利品。 \n \n [DECEA3]武器合約：[-]商人可以提供您一些獲得獨特武器的絕佳機會。在武器選項卡中搜尋要購買的合約。請記住，隨著遊戲關卡的增加，會提供更多武器。 \n \n 第 4 部分繼續。
